ISA 401 Final Project: Exploratory Analysis

Mia Weber, Victoria Rhodes, & Helen Kreitzer

2026-05-08

Final Dataset: Exploratory Summaries

Preprocessing

# load libraries
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
## 
## Attaching package: 'dplyr'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:stats':
## 
##     filter, lag
## The following objects are masked from 'package:base':
## 
##     intersect, setdiff, setequal, union
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)

# load final merged dataset
df <- read_csv("college_roi.csv")
## Rows: 10 Columns: 14
## ── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Delimiter: ","
## chr (5): school, top_3_tools, top_3_skills, average_salary, state
## dbl (9): id, avg_tech_score, course_count, average_salary_num, tuition_in, t...
## 
## ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
## ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.

Descriptive Summaries

# structure of dataset
str(df)
## spc_tbl_ [10 × 14] (S3: spec_tbl_df/tbl_df/tbl/data.frame)
##  $ id                : num [1:10] 200800 201441 202134 203517 204024 ...
##  $ school            : chr [1:10] "University of Akron" "Bowling Green State University" "Cleveland State University" "Kent State University" ...
##  $ avg_tech_score    : num [1:10] 5.57 5.21 5.05 5.26 5.27 ...
##  $ top_3_tools       : chr [1:10] "Excel, Tableau or Power BI, Tableau/Power BI" "Excel, Creative tools (Adobe), Presentation software" "Excel, Global market research databases, Survey platforms (Qualtrics)" "Excel, Academic research databases, CRM systems" ...
##  $ top_3_skills      : chr [1:10] "Brand Management, Business-to-Business Marketing, Capstone / Applied Marketing Project" "Advertising / Integrated Marketing Communications, Brand Management, Consumer Insights / Behavior" "Applied Consulting / Capstone, B2B Marketing, CRM / Customer Analytics" "Advanced Buyer Behavior (Doctoral), Advanced Marketing Strategy (Doctoral), Advanced Sales / Experiential Selling" ...
##  $ course_count      : num [1:10] 14 19 20 34 15 25 27 15 23 30
##  $ average_salary    : chr [1:10] "$44,276" "$51,652" "$38,829" "$40,117" ...
##  $ average_salary_num: num [1:10] 44276 51652 38829 40117 58279 ...
##  $ state             : chr [1:10] "OH" "OH" "OH" "OH" ...
##  $ tuition_in        : num [1:10] 13135 14460 12988 13232 18161 ...
##  $ tuition_out       : num [1:10] 20815 22448 18510 23082 41221 ...
##  $ earnings          : num [1:10] 46600 47896 52131 45388 55076 ...
##  $ debt              : num [1:10] 23250 25000 21797 24500 23000 ...
##  $ ROI               : num [1:10] 23350 22896 30334 20888 32076 ...
##  - attr(*, "spec")=
##   .. cols(
##   ..   id = col_double(),
##   ..   school = col_character(),
##   ..   avg_tech_score = col_double(),
##   ..   top_3_tools = col_character(),
##   ..   top_3_skills = col_character(),
##   ..   course_count = col_double(),
##   ..   average_salary = col_character(),
##   ..   average_salary_num = col_double(),
##   ..   state = col_character(),
##   ..   tuition_in = col_double(),
##   ..   tuition_out = col_double(),
##   ..   earnings = col_double(),
##   ..   debt = col_double(),
##   ..   ROI = col_double()
##   .. )
##  - attr(*, "problems")=<externalptr>
# summary statistics
summary(df)
##        id            school          avg_tech_score  top_3_tools       
##  Min.   :200800   Length:10          Min.   :4.567   Length:10         
##  1st Qu.:201947   Class :character   1st Qu.:5.045   Class :character  
##  Median :203770   Mode  :character   Median :5.238   Mode  :character

##  3rd Qu.:204842                      3rd Qu.:5.428                     
##  Max.   :206695                      Max.   :5.867                     
##  top_3_skills        course_count  average_salary     average_salary_num

##  Class :character   1st Qu.:16.0   Class :character   1st Qu.:41244

##                     Mean   :22.2                      Mean   :46870     
##                     3rd Qu.:26.5                      3rd Qu.:51172     
##                     Max.   :34.0                      Max.   :58279     
##     state             tuition_in     tuition_out       earnings    
##  Length:10          Min.   :11113   Min.   :11473   Min.   :41544  
##  Class :character   1st Qu.:13025   1st Qu.:21137   1st Qu.:46924  
##  Mode  :character   Median :13238   Median :22765   Median :51382  
##                     Mean   :13721   Mean   :25382   Mean   :50707  
##                     3rd Qu.:14112   3rd Qu.:28192   3rd Qu.:54253  
##                     Max.   :18161   Max.   :41221   Max.   :60409  
##       debt            ROI       
##  Min.   :19976   Min.   :17544  
##  1st Qu.:21387   1st Qu.:23010  
##  Median :22625   Median :29358  
##  Mean   :22608   Mean   :28099  
##  3rd Qu.:23812   3rd Qu.:31938  
##  Max.   :25000   Max.   :40433
# missing value check
colSums(is.na(df))
##                 id             school     avg_tech_score        top_3_tools 
##                  0                  0                  0                  0 
##       top_3_skills       course_count     average_salary average_salary_num 
##                  0                  0                  0                  0 
##              state         tuition_in        tuition_out           earnings 
##                  0                  0                  0                  0 
##               debt                ROI 
##                  0                  0

Data Validation

validation_table <- data.frame(
  check = c(
    "Duplicate school IDs",
    "Missing salary values",
    "Missing ROI values",
    "Missing tech scores",
    "Duplicate schools",
    "Schools excluded from extraction"
  ),
  
  result = c(
    sum(duplicated(df$id)),
    sum(is.na(df$average_salary_num)),
    sum(is.na(df$ROI)),
    sum(is.na(df$avg_tech_score)),
    sum(duplicated(df$school)),
    "Wright State University"
  )
)

validation_table
##                              check                  result
## 1             Duplicate school IDs                       0
## 2            Missing salary values                       0
## 3               Missing ROI values                       0
## 4              Missing tech scores                       0
## 5                Duplicate schools                       0
## 6 Schools excluded from extraction Wright State University

Exploratory Analysis

ROI by School

ggplot(df,
       aes(x = reorder(school, ROI),
           y = ROI)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "ROI by School",
    x = "School",
    y = "ROI"
  )

Average Marketing Salary by School

ggplot(df,
       aes(x = reorder(school, average_salary_num),
           y = average_salary_num)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Average Marketing Salary by School",
    x = "School",
    y = "Average Salary"
  )

Tech Score vs Salary

ggplot(df,
       aes(x = avg_tech_score,
           y = average_salary_num,
           label = school)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_text_repel(size = 3,
                  max.overlaps = Inf) +
  labs(
    title = "Tech Score vs Marketing Salary",
    x = "Average Tech Score",
    y = "Average Salary"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

Tuition vs ROI

ggplot(df,
       aes(x = tuition_in,
           y = ROI,
           label = school)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_text_repel(size = 3,
                  max.overlaps = Inf) +
  labs(
    title = "In-State Tuition vs College ROI",
    x = "In-State Tuition",
    y = "ROI"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

Correlation Matrix

numeric_df <- df |>
  select(
    avg_tech_score,
    average_salary_num,
    tuition_in,
    earnings,
    debt,
    ROI
  )

round(cor(numeric_df),3)
##                    avg_tech_score average_salary_num tuition_in earnings   debt
## avg_tech_score              1.000              0.303      0.137    0.290 -0.102
## average_salary_num          0.303              1.000      0.775    0.586 -0.194
## tuition_in                  0.137              0.775      1.000    0.473 -0.009
## earnings                    0.290              0.586      0.473    1.000 -0.815
## debt                       -0.102             -0.194     -0.009   -0.815  1.000
## ROI                         0.256              0.514      0.380    0.991 -0.887
##                       ROI
## avg_tech_score      0.256
## average_salary_num  0.514
## tuition_in          0.380
## earnings            0.991
## debt               -0.887
## ROI                 1.000
